message:
wa-z0e.5: recording export with HTML player, Asciinema cast, and redaction

Add recording export pipeline: .war files can now be exported to Asciinema V2
cast format and self-contained HTML pages with embedded asciinema-player.
Privacy redaction uses the existing Redactor (15+ secret patterns) plus custom
regex patterns. CLI: `wa record export <file> [--format html|asciinema] [-o path]`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
